title: Pro Assistant Cutting Board
description: Relieves Farmer's Delight recipe conflicts, serves as a helmet, and auto-supplies dishes.
body:
1.it can cut out many recipes from the Farmers'deilghts in different places.
Automatically supply dishes in the content slot (a cutting board must be on top of this block), allowing players to cut quickly.
Can be used as a helmet.
Usage: After placing it, use a tool within a 333 area around it to open the GUI. Put the dishes to be cut in the content slot, then select the one to cut from the recipe list on the right. Then tick the checkbox between the content slot and the browsing slot, and do not switch tools—cut it. If satisfied, switch to another (different) item to cut, then switch back to this item to cut, following the same initial steps.
